summary: Iteration 29: Dashboard Module Settings Testing. Backend: 8/8 tests PASSED. Frontend: Settings page works correctly (8 toggles visible), but Dashboard does NOT respect Weather and AI settings.

ui_bugs.issue: Weather pill in header does NOT respect show_dashboard_weather=false setting. Still visible when toggle is OFF.
AI Flockanalys section does NOT respect show_dashboard_ai_analysis=false setting. Still visible when toggle is OFF.

action_items: Fix Dashboard.tsx line 635: Add (featurePrefs.show_dashboard_weather !== false) && check before weather pill
Fix Dashboard.tsx line 930: Add (featurePrefs.show_dashboard_ai_analysis !== false) && check before AI Flockanalys section
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.tsx: Weather pill at line 635 renders when weather?.current exists but ignores featurePrefs.show_dashboard_weather
Dashboard.tsx: AI Flockanalys section at line 930 renders when flockAnalysis?.summary exists but ignores featurePrefs.show_dashboard_ai_analysis
Other modules (Agda inbox line 848, Ranking line 868, National stats line 966, Leaderboard line 1061, Friends line 1082) correctly check featurePrefs - Weather and AI should follow same pattern
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend feature-preferences API works perfectly. Settings page UI with 8 dashboard module toggles works. The issue is in Dashboard.tsx where Weather pill and AI Flockanalys sections need conditional rendering based on featurePrefs state. Similar pattern is already used for other modules.

backend_apis.GET_feature_preferences: PASSED - Returns all 8 dashboard module settings correctly
backend_apis.PUT_feature_preferences: PASSED - Updates settings and persists them
backend_apis.available_for_all_users: PASSED - Non-premium can toggle dashboard modules

frontend_mobile_390x844.settings_dashboard_moduler_section: PASSED - All 8 toggles visible with data-testid
frontend_mobile_390x844.toggle_interaction: PASSED - Clicking toggle calls PUT API and updates state
frontend_mobile_390x844.dashboard_weather_hidden: FAILED - Weather pill still visible when setting is OFF
frontend_mobile_390x844.dashboard_ai_hidden: FAILED - AI Flockanalys still visible when setting is OFF

frontend_desktop_1920x800.dashboard_weather_hidden: FAILED - Weather pill still visible (7°) when setting is OFF
frontend_desktop_1920x800.dashboard_ai_hidden: FAILED - AI Flockanalys section still visible when setting is OFF
